title: Python Programming Basics
description: An introduction to Python syntax, variables, control flow, functions, and simple scripts.

title: Git and GitHub Foundations
description: Learn version control basics, commits, branches, pull requests, and collaborative workflows.

title: Data Structures Intro
description: Covers lists, stacks, queues, dictionaries, sets, trees, and when to use each structure.

title: Algorithms Basics
description: Practice searching, sorting, recursion, complexity analysis, and basic problem-solving patterns.

title: HTML and CSS Fundamentals
description: Build static pages while learning semantic HTML, CSS layout, responsive design, and accessibility basics.

title: JavaScript Essentials
description: Learn JavaScript fundamentals, DOM manipulation, events, modules, and asynchronous code.

title: Build a Frontend Mini App
description: Create a small interactive browser app with state, reusable components, and deployed source control.

title: SQL and Relational Databases
description: Study tables, relationships, SELECT queries, joins, aggregation, indexes, and basic schema design.

title: REST API Design
description: Design and implement HTTP APIs with routing, validation, persistence, authentication concepts, and error handling.

title: Testing and Debugging Practice
description: Write unit tests, reproduce bugs, inspect failures, use logging, and build safer development habits.

title: Data Analysis with Pandas
description: Load, clean, transform, summarize, and visualize datasets using Python data analysis tools.

title: Machine Learning Concepts Reading
description: A guided reading path covering supervised learning, evaluation metrics, overfitting, and model selection.
